values.name: open-lab03-artefacts-tax-service-gov-uk/request-count-by-ip

values.name: open-lab03-artefacts-tax-service-gov-uk/request-status-codes
values.query_string:
fields `sc-status`

values.name: open-lab03-artefacts-tax-service-gov-uk/requests-by-edge-location

values.name: open-lab03-artefacts-tax-service-gov-uk/top-requested-files
values.query_string:
parse `cs-uri-stem` /(?<filepath>([^\/]+\.(jar|zip|etc)$))/
| filter ispresent(filepath)
| stats count (filepath) as file_count by filepath
| sort file_count desc
| limit 10

values.name: RewriteDefaultIndexRequest

query_string.constant_value:
fields `c-ip`
| stats count (`c-ip`) as request_count by `c-ip`
| sort request_count desc

fields `sc-status`
| stats count (`sc-status`) as status_codes by `sc-status`
| sort `sc-status` asc

fields `x-edge-location` as edge_location
| stats count (edge_location) as location by edge_location
| sort location desc

parse `cs-uri-stem` /(?<filepath>([^\/]+\.(jar|zip|etc)$))/
| filter ispresent(filepath)
| stats count (filepath) as file_count by filepath
| sort file_count desc
| limit 10

content.constant_value: This resource does not exist or has been removed

kms_alias_arn.description: The ARN of the created KMS key alias

kms_key_arn.description: The ARN of the created KMS key

kms_key_id.description: The ID of the created KMS key

blocked_encryption_types.description: Specify the encryption types to block for server-side encryption. SSE-C is blocked by default.

bucket_key_enabled.description: Specify whether to enable bucket key for server-side encryption.

bucket_name.description: The name of the S3 bucket to create

bucket_object_ownership.description: The setting used to define ownership of bucket objects. Defaults to 'BucketOwnerEnforced', which is the recommended setting. Can be changed in situations where less secure settings are required e.g. to allow CloudFront to deliver standard logs to the bucket, which requires 'BucketOwnerPreferred'.

data_sensitivity.description: For buckets with PII or other sensitive data, the tag data_sensitivity: high must be applied.

kms_key_policy.description: The KMS key policy to attach when creating a KMS key

kms_rotation_period_in_days.description: Custom KMS rotation interval; must be between 90 and 2560 days

log_bucket_id.description: The name of the access logs bucket

object_lock.description: Specify whether to lock objects on the bucket to prevent modification

tags.description: Additional tags to apply to the bucket

transition_to_glacier_days.description: The number of days after object creation when the object will transition to Glacier storage; if 0, Glacier transition is disabled

use_default_encryption.description: Specify whether to use default encryption or generate a customer managed KMS key

versioning_enabled.description: When true the s3 bucket contents will be versioned

override_policy_documents.description: List of IAM policy documents to merge. Overrides statements with the same sid.
List of IAM policy documents to merge. Overrides statements with the same sid.
